subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be My glory and loving-kindness! Ask thou of God on behalf of His servants that which hath shone forth from the horizon of His Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س علیک بهائی و عنایتی از حق بطلب عباد خود را بر آنچه از افق اراده اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
